parameterDefinitions.name: VWEB AUTH PROVIDER
parameterDefinitions.displayText: VWEB auth provider: jwt (default). Future: introspect / saml (read via VWEBA $$cfg)

parameterDefinitions.name: VWEB AUTH JWT KEY
parameterDefinitions.displayText: VWEB HS256 JWT verify key (the shared secret; empty = auth fail-closed)

parameterDefinitions.name: VWEB AUTH ISSUER
parameterDefinitions.displayText: VWEB required token issuer (iss); empty = not enforced

parameterDefinitions.name: VWEB AUTH AUDIENCE
parameterDefinitions.displayText: VWEB required token audience (aud); empty = not enforced

parameterDefinitions.name: VWEB AUTH SUBJECT CLAIM
parameterDefinitions.displayText: VWEB token claim carrying the principal (default sub; read via VWEBA $$cfg)

parameterDefinitions.name: VWEB AUTH IDENTITY MAP
parameterDefinitions.displayText: VWEB subject->#200 map: secid (EN1^XUPSQRY, default) | ien (subject is a #200 IEN)

parameterDefinitions.name: VWEB LISTEN PORT
parameterDefinitions.displayText: VWEB inbound listener TCP port (read by VWEBL via $$port^VWEBCFG at SYS)

parameterDefinitions.name: VWEB TLS SERVER CONFIG
parameterDefinitions.displayText: VWEB named server TLS config (operator-provisioned; empty = HTTP-first)

parameterDefinitions.name: VWEB IDLE TIMEOUT
parameterDefinitions.displayText: VWEB keep-alive idle seconds (read by VWEBL via $$idleTimeout^VWEBCFG)

parameterDefinitions.name: VWEB MAX BODY
parameterDefinitions.displayText: VWEB maximum inbound request body bytes (read via $$maxBody^VWEBCFG)

parameterDefinitions.name: VWEB MAX WORKERS
parameterDefinitions.displayText: VWEB concurrency cap (1 = serial, the v0.1 default; read via $$maxWorkers^VWEBCFG)
